pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates file at this exact path; consistent usage in export_result.sh
Referenced consistently in setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and verifier.py
Referenced consistently in setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and verifier.py
Verified against apartment_specs.txt: Entry Foyer, Living/Dining Room, Kitchen, Master Bedroom, Master Bathroom, Walk-in Closet, Second Bedroom, Second Bathroom
Cross-referenced against apartment_specs.txt REQUIRED FURNITURE section. 'fridge' does not appear in specs; specs use 'Refrigerator' instead
verifier.py awards full 15 points for shape_count >= 30; matches metadata requirement
verifier.py awards full 20 points for rooms_found >= 6; matches metadata requirement of 6 room label types

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic apartment floor plan specification for a 2-bedroom/2-bathroom luxury apartment (Unit 38F) in the real MiMA Tower building at 450 West 42nd Street, Manhattan. The floor plan requires 8 distinct rooms: foyer, living, kitchen, master bedroom, master bath, walk-in closet, second bedroom, and second bath. Task requires minimum 30 shapes and labeling of 6+ room types with dimensions. Furniture keywords expected include beds, sofa, tables, chairs, toilets, sinks, showers, stove, refrigerator, desk, and TV. The output files are saved to ~/Desktop as apartment_floorplan.drawio and apartment_floorplan.png. One metadata claim is contradicted: 'fridge' is listed but the specifications use 'refrigerator' instead.
